name: Grinder's Farm
description: Local grinders-farm plugin: /farm command and grinders_farm tool with local game state and push.

gameRoot.description: Path to grinders-farm repo root (contains src/adapters/oneshot.ts). Optional when `grinders-farm` CLI is already in PATH or `GRINDERS_FARM_ROOT` is set.

autoStartWorkerOnGatewayBoot.description: If true (default), auto-start background day-advance worker on Gateway boot. Set false to start manually.

imageServerPort.description: Local HTTP image server port for farm.png links (default 18931, listens on 127.0.0.1 only).
